_meta.schema: MT-anchored. Each entry maps a MT-versification reference to its English/BSB/LXX equivalent. Absent entries are assumed aligned across all traditions.

JER-10-11.note: Single Aramaic verse in Hebrew context

1SA-24-1.note: MT begins ch.24 here; English ends ch.23 here — verse shift continues through 24:22 (MT) = 24:1-21 (English)

JON-2-1.note: Jonah ch.1/ch.2 boundary differs: MT puts the great-fish appointment at 2:1; BSB/English put it at 1:17. MT 2:1-11 = BSB 1:17 + 2:1-10.

2CH-1-18.note: 2 Chronicles ch.1/ch.2 boundary differs: MT puts Solomon's resolve to build the temple at 1:18; BSB/English put it at 2:1. MT 2:1-17 = BSB 2:2-18 (offset +1 throughout ch.2).

2CH-2-1.note: 2 Chronicles ch.2 is offset +1 from English/BSB throughout: MT 2:N = English 2:(N+1), because MT counts Solomon's resolve to build (1:18) where English starts ch.2 (2:1). MT 2:1-17 = English 2:2-18.

2CH-13-23.note: 2 Chronicles ch.13/ch.14 boundary: MT 13:23 (Abijah rests, Asa reigns, land quiet 10 yrs) = English/BSB 14:1. Chapter 14 then runs +1 (MT 14:N = English 14:N+1).

2CH-14-1.note: 2 Chronicles ch.14 is offset +1 from English/BSB: MT 14:N = English 14:(N+1), because MT 13:23 = English 14:1. MT 14:1-14 = English 14:2-15.
